No 'as any' casts added to replace assertions â€” actual type fixes only

stories.description: Guard All Array/Object Method Calls. Add null/undefined guards before all .map()/.filter()/.reduce()/.forEach() calls and Object.entries/keys/values() calls on API data that could be undefined or null.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Read each modified file â€” confirm no .map()/.filter()/.reduce()/.forEach() is called on a variable that could be undefined without a guard
Read each modified file â€” confirm no Object.entries/keys/values() is called on a variable that could be null without ?? {}
VPC: unit tests pass, tsc clean, vitest pass for each modified component

stories.description: Fix All setTimeout Memory Leaks + Stale Closure. Extract auto-feedback pattern into a reusable hook, replace all raw setTimeout feedback patterns in components, and fix stale closure in App.tsx refreshData.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: hooks/useAutoFeedback.ts exists with unit tests covering: show message, auto-clear after duration, cleanup on unmount
No raw setTimeout(() => set...null patterns remain in any component listed â€” verify by reading each file
App.tsx refreshData useCallback deps include companyId

stories.description: Wave 1 Verification. Run full frontend and backend test suites and Playwright smoke tests to confirm all Wave 1 crash-proofing stories pass without regressions.

cd server && npx vitest run passes with >= 1,869 BE tests

stories.description: Global 401/403 Interceptor + Session Expired Modal. Add auth error interception to apiFetch(), emit session-expired event, and build a SessionExpiredModal component that handles deduplication.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: apiFetch() detects 401 and emits auth:session-expired event
apiFetch() detects 403 and throws ForbiddenError
storageService.ts no longer returns empty arrays on auth errors â€” it lets the error propagate
SessionExpiredModal renders with role='alertdialog' and aria-modal='true'
Clicking Sign In calls logout and navigates to login
Multiple rapid 401s only show one modal
VPC: unit tests pass, tsc clean, vitest pass for api.ts, storageService.ts, App.tsx, SessionExpiredModal

getSignedUrl() returns a URL path that resolves to the download endpoint
Download endpoint returns file with correct MIME type and Content-Disposition header

stories.description: Email Delivery Service. Implement a real notification delivery service using nodemailer (or equivalent) that transitions notification job status to SENT or FAILED based on delivery outcome.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: With SMTP configured: POST /api/notification-jobs with channel=email sends real email
Without SMTP configured: job created with status=FAILED, sync_error='SMTP not configured'
Job status is SENT (with sent_at timestamp) on success
Job status is FAILED (with sync_error message) on delivery failure
VPC: unit tests pass, tsc clean; mock nodemailer transport â€” verify sendMail called with correct to/subject/body

stories.description: Driver Certificate Expiry Alerts. Implement a cert expiry checker service that identifies expiring certificates, creates notification jobs, and optionally sends emails when SMTP is configured.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: GET /api/safety/cert-expiry-check returns list of expiring certificates with days-until-expiry
Each expiring cert creates a notification job in the DB
If SMTP configured, email is actually sent for each expiring cert
Unit tests: mock DB with 3 certs (expired, 7-day, 60-day) â€” verify 2 notification jobs created
